hook: The best accountability partner is the one who profits when you fail.
Miss your push-ups. Fund your wife's bubble tea.
warning: Do NOT show this app to your spouse… unless you're ready for them to become your accountability coach.
This app gives your partner a dangerous amount of power. Use responsibly.
Warning: your excuses are about to lose.
invite: There is no turning back now 😈
Your accountability boss has been notified.
Your partner has entered the chat. Excuses have been disabled.
dashboard: Your streak survived yesterday. Don't make it regret trusting you.
Your streak is waiting. Your excuses are not invited.
Your partner is financially invested in your success.
10 push-ups stand between you and their coffee fund.
success: Streak protected. Your partner earned $0 today. Everyone wins.
Nice. Your wallet lives to fight another day.
Done. Your partner is mildly disappointed. 😏
Streak saved. Your partner is proud. (Probably.)
failure: Your wallet lost. Your partner won.
Your partner just unlocked coffee money.
partner_watching: Your partner has entered the chat.
Your partner is waiting for free bubble tea. 🧋
penalty_raised: Bold move. Your wallet felt that.
